section.heading: Determination and collection of liability; notification of employer
section.chapeau: When an employer withdraws from a multiemployer plan, the plan sponsor, in accordance with this part, shall—

paragraph.content: determine the amount of the employer’s withdrawal liability,
notify the employer of the amount of the withdrawal liability, and
collect the amount of the withdrawal liability from the employer.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 93–406, title IV, § 4202, as added Pub. L. 96–364, title I, § 104(2), Sept. 26, 1980, 94 Stat. 1218.)
